Default.$description: Used as primary surface for components, such as Card, Side sheet, and Dialog.

Variant.$description: Used for elevated or emphasized surfaces (such as data table headers).

Variant subtle.$description: Used for lightly elevated or secondary surfaces on top of surface-default, for low emphasis areas where subtle distinction is needed from the base surface.

Inverse 🚫.$description: Alternative surface color used for surfaces of alternative components, such as Side navigation, Toast and Tooltip.
